mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_ID, REPLY_CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, BOARD_ID, USER_ID, DELETE_DATE, MODIFY_DATE ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{req.content}, SYSDATE, #{postId}, #{req.userId}, NULL, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT REPLY_ID AS commentId, BOARD_ID AS postId, USER_ID AS userId, REPLY_CONTENT AS content, CAST(CREATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP) AS createdAt FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{postId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE REPLY SET DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_ID = #{commentId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
